quickFacts: Home to Mercedes-Benz and Porsche — car lovers' paradise
The Stäffele (outdoor staircases) connect hillside neighbourhoods
Stuttgart has its own wine region — Trollinger is the local red
The Königstraße is one of Germany's longest pedestrian shopping streets
foodScene: Maultaschen (Swabian ravioli) are the local specialty — fried, in broth, or with potato salad. Spätzle with cheese (Käsespätzle) is the ultimate comfort food. Zwiebelrostbraten (onion roast beef) at a traditional Besenwirtschaft (seasonal wine tavern). Local wines from hillside vineyards.

places.name: Mercedes-Benz Museum
places.caption: Automotive cathedral
places.description: Nine floors spiralling through 130 years of automotive history. Even non-car-fans are impressed by the architecture and design. Allow 3 hours.

places.name: Porsche Museum
places.caption: Speed & design
places.description: Sleek white building housing 80+ vehicles. The rooftop terrace and the driving simulators are highlights. Combined ticket with Mercedes possible.

places.name: Schlossplatz
places.caption: City centre square
places.description: The Neues Schloss palace, fountains, and manicured gardens in the heart of Stuttgart. Free concerts and festivals in summer.

places.name: Killesbergpark
places.caption: Hilltop park & tower
places.description: Beautiful parkland with a free observation tower offering 360° views. Mini railway, flamingos, and the best picnic spots in the city.

places.name: Markthalle Stuttgart
places.caption: Art Nouveau food hall
places.description: Gorgeous 1914 market hall with gourmet food stalls, wine bars, and international delicacies. Great for lunch or picking up local specialties.

places.name: Stäffele Walking Tour
places.caption: Hillside stairway network
places.description: Over 400 outdoor staircases wind through vineyard-covered hills. Follow a self-guided route past hidden viewpoints and wine taverns.

places.name: Württemberg Mausoleum
places.caption: Hilltop tomb with vineyard views
places.description: A neoclassical chapel atop a vineyard-covered hill. The panoramic view of Stuttgart and the Neckar Valley is worth the short hike.

places.name: Bohnenviertel
places.caption: Artisan quarter
places.description: Stuttgart's oldest quarter with half-timbered houses, antique shops, wine bars, and small galleries. Charming and tourist-free.

places.name: Wilhelma Zoo & Botanical Gardens
places.caption: Moorish-style zoo
places.description: A unique zoo in Moorish Revival architecture with 11,000 animals and Europe's largest magnolia grove. Part zoo, part botanical garden, all impressive.

places.name: Day Trip: Black Forest
places.caption: Fairy-tale forest
places.description: Dense fir forests, cuckoo clocks, and Black Forest cake in its homeland. Drive the Schwarzwaldhochstraße for dramatic viewpoints, or hike to waterfalls.

places.name: Staatsgalerie
places.caption: Art museum
places.description: James Stirling's postmodern building housing old masters and modern art. Picasso, Kandinsky, Beuys and the Swabian Impressionists.

places.name: Killesberg Park & Tower
places.caption: Park with a view
places.description: Hilltop park with a 40m observation tower, miniature railway, flamingos and flower gardens. Free panoramic views.

places.name: Markthalle
places.caption: Art Nouveau food hall
places.description: Beautiful 1914 market hall with gourmet food stalls, spices, wines and lunch counters. Stuttgart's culinary centrepiece.

places.name: Stäffele (Outdoor Stairs)
places.caption: Hillside stairways
places.description: Stuttgart has 400+ outdoor staircases connecting its hills. Walk the 'Stäffelestour' route for views and hidden wine taverns.

places.name: Bad Cannstatt Mineral Baths
places.caption: Thermal spa
places.description: Europe's second-largest mineral water source. Historical Leuze or modern SchwimmBad — swim in heated mineral pools.

places.name: Esslingen Day Trip
places.caption: Medieval wine town
places.description: Incredibly well-preserved half-timbered town 15 min by S-Bahn. Castle, wine taverns and Germany's oldest half-timbered houses.
